fields.title: Project Coordinator | Research Consultant | Data & Field Operations Specialist | IT Professional
fields.summary: A dedicated professional committed to delivering excellence through data-driven decisions and technical innovation across global operations.
fields.about_text:
With a robust background spanning over a decade in field operations, IT consultancy, and high-impact research projects, I specialize in bridging the gap between complex data and actionable strategic insights.

My journey has been defined by a commitment to precision and operational efficiency. Whether coordinating multi-million dollar regional initiatives or designing bespoke IT infrastructures for emerging markets, my focus remains on creating sustainable value through technological innovation and human-centric leadership.

fields.title: Project Coordination
fields.description: Expert management of complex field operations, team leadership, and cross-functional stakeholder alignment to ensure mission success.

fields.title: Research & Data
fields.description: Quantitative and qualitative data collection, rigorous cleaning, and advanced analytical modelling to reveal underlying patterns.

fields.title: IT Infrastructure
fields.description: Comprehensive IT professional services from network architecture to system security and digital transformation strategies.

fields.name: STATA / SPSS
fields.description: Advanced statistical modelling and dataset manipulation.

fields.name: Operations
fields.description: Logistics management and regional field supervision.

fields.name: Networking
fields.description: Cisco, Mikrotik and Ubiquiti network deployments.
Overseeing end-to-end data collection lifecycle across 12 districts, managing a team of 45 field agents and ensuring 99% data accuracy.
Leading the architectural redesign of the core enterprise AI platform, improving processing efficiency by 40% while maintaining 99.99% uptime for global clients.

fields.point: Spearheaded the migration of legacy monolithic architecture to a high-availability microservices mesh.

fields.title: National Census Field Ops
fields.description: Strategic coordination for large-scale demographic data capture.
